A '''moisture farmer''' hoped to purchase some [[Droid/Legends|droids]] from a [[Jawajawa clan|Jawa clan]] only to learn that they were not able to sell him any, as [[Unidentified Jawa Hero|one of their number]] had destroyed the entire stock of droids.

==Behind the scenes==
This individual only appears in the story ''[[Oh!! Jawajawa]]'', published in ''[[Star Wars Manga: Silver]]'' issue of [[Tokyopop's Star Wars Manga]]. Originally published in Japan, those stories were considered to be of "fuzzy" continuity by Lucasfilm.<ref>{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=152583&start=980#15895005|thread=Holocron continuity database questions|user=[[Leland Chee|Leland Y Chee]]|date=2006-11-06|time=6:03 PM}}</ref> Since then, they have been republished in English in the United Kingdom under the [[Infinities]] label, which established the material in them as [[Canon|non-canonical]].
